meaning: n.[生化]玉米烯酮(一种由粉红镰刀菌产生的霉菌毒素)
examples: Cross reactivity of the antibodies with zearalenone was 1.35%.
Abstract : Zearalenone (ZEA), an estrogen toxin produced by some fungal species of the genera Fusarium, is a kind of secondary metabolite.
This essay makes a general account of the chemical and physical properties of zearalenone, its poisonousness, its functional mechanism and check method.
